GF5 GF5: Animating 3D Characters

Part 3 Group Project

Previous: Interim
On this page What To Do Now What To Keep Release Status

The Part 3 brief will be released after the Parts 1 and 2 checkpoint. This page reserves the public link so the website can grow without changing its navigation.

What To Do Now

  • Complete the Part 1 forward-kinematics implementation.
  • Complete the Part 2 one-hot and LBS skinning implementation.
  • Keep your custom motion clip and exported videos available.
  • Submit the interim report and media described in the Part 2 checklist.

What To Keep

Keep the custom motion you author in Part 1. It is reused in Part 2 and may be useful evidence later.

Keep the one-hot versus LBS observations from Part 2. They are the bridge between simple FK and more realistic character animation.

Release Status

Draft Part 3 notes may exist in development copies of the repository. Treat this placeholder as the student-facing instruction until the final Part 3 brief is announced.
